_comment: CerbaSeal policy template. All sections are optional — omit any section you do not need. See docs/client-adoption/policy-pack-authoring-guide.md.

actorMappings._comment: Map your organization's role names to CerbaSeal authority classes. Keys are your role names, values must be a valid authority class.

approvalChains._comment: Per-workflow list of authority classes that are permitted to approve. Requests from classes not in this list will REJECT.

actionPolicies._comment: Per-workflow action behaviour. Values: requires_approval | auto_allow | blocked
